title: PD Evidence-to-Discovery Dataset
subtitle: Evidence, omics, pathways, trials and repurposing assets for PD
description: This dataset contains processed outputs from an AI-assisted evidence-to-discovery project on Parkinson's disease prevention and disease-modifying strategy prioritisation. Assets include ranked candidate interventions, pathway-to-intervention mappings, individual prevention measures, ClinicalTrials.gov mining outputs, GSE72267 limma differential-expression outputs, GO and exploratory Reactome enrichment outputs, drug-repurposing candidate rankings, multi-omics expansion inventories, NCBI GEO/GDS dataset-discovery results, Open Targets and GWAS Catalog genetic evidence outputs, ChEMBL selectivity summaries, ClinicalTrials.gov public API trial-gap outputs, experimental-validation work packages, manuscript tables, publication-ready figures, scripts, reference audit files, and reproducibility logs. Blocked outputs are labelled where analyses require external summary statistics, restricted services, patent review or specialist docking workflows. The version-controlled GitHub repository with CI validation is available at https://github.com/hssling/parkinsons-evidence-to-discovery-prioritisation. The dataset is for research, education, reproducibility, and hypothesis generation only. It does not identify a cure and does not recommend investigational or repurposed drugs for clinical use outside approved indications or clinical trials.
